fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a location code for the warehouse or distribution center where your items are handled and stored before being sold.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies expiration date for the specified lot.

fields.name: Quality
fields.tooltip: Specifies the test quality of the specified lot.

fields.name: Certificate Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the certificate number of the specified lot.

fields.name: Qty. In Hand
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory level of an item.

fields.name: Gross Requirement
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the total demand for the item. The gross requirement consists of independent demand (which include sales orders, service orders, transfer orders, and demand forecasts) and dependent demand (which include production order components for planned, firm planned, and released production orders and requisition and planning worksheets lines).

fields.name: Planned Order Receipt
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's availability figures for the planned order receipt.

fields.name: Scheduled Receipt
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of items from replenishment orders.

fields.name: Available Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is currently in inventory and not reserved for other demand.
